prompt: Keep the woman EXACTLY as she is in the photo — her face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, hands, and especially her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress — completely unchanged. Do NOT repaint, restyle, or alter her face or identity; treat her as a locked, untouched layer. Keep her feet and the ground fully visible, resting naturally on pale stone paving. Replace ONLY the background. A bright white Cycladic plaster wall with a weathered pale-blue wooden shutter window positioned high and clearly to the RIGHT, fully behind her and well clear of her head and body so it does not overlap her at all. Open white negative space around her. Soft warm Mediterranean daylight matching the existing light on her. Soft realistic contact shadow grounding her. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color, calm slow-fashion mood — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
